text:
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
45 
FILE(S): 
APL Service Area 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 
VALUES: 
The field can contain any alphanumeric characters, digits, or symbols (e.g., BROWN COUNTY, ALL MA 
STATEWIDE, 0234). Null/missing = unknown/missing 
COMMENT: 
Each managed care service area name is associated with a MC_PLAN_ID. 
CMS provides states with guidance for reporting this field: https://www.medicaid.gov/medicaid/data-
and-systems/macbis/tmsis/tmsis-blog/entry/47542 
^ Back to
